qa_note: Kiko's latest nine standard animations and unchanged 16-direction loop preserve the established 3D gecko identity, read correctly at pet size, and pass deterministic and independent visual QA.
review_warnings: Intentional idle camouflage transparency and the historically accepted running-left frame 2 and jumping poses remain unchanged.
157.5->180 and 337.5->000 are metric outliers, but normal-size review shows natural foreshortening with planted feet, stable torso and tail, and no conspicuous snap or reversal.
Reported lower-body transparency is intentional separation between feet, legs, and tail rather than an interior body hole.
Legacy standard rows retain intentional state-coded hue shifts while preserving identity.
